summary: Lightly captioned Mother's Day speech clip of Trump at the White House Rose Garden podium thanking America's moms and Angel/Gold Star moms. Static single-shot podium footage with a headline caption banner and subtitles; no music track or cinematic editing, so it is a raw speech with a text card rather than produced content.
notable_text: President Trump to America's Moms: 'You Have The Most Important Job There Is'; The White House; Gold Star moms
